userMessage: Create a ticket draft to migrate the MCP ticket card to Sunpeak.

toolInput.conversationContext: We already compared Overlord's MCP implementation against Sunpeak. Now move the ticket-card UI into a Sunpeak resource and keep the existing production contract unchanged while we validate the simulator workflow.
